top_reacted_messages.content: Things have been pretty hectic for us lately, and everyone’s been running around
top_reacted_messages.author: game.producer.light

top_reacted_messages.content:
Our view and planning for collaborations are quite different from most games.

O
top_reacted_messages.author: game.producer.light
top_reacted_messages.channel: 对于联动的期限规划 On the Duration and Planning of Collaborations

top_reacted_messages.content:
我们对于联动的看法和规划和大部份游戏不同。

我们的着重点不是短期商业变现行为，而是希望在《忘却前夜》中探讨联动作品的更多可能。加上本来我们就产能有限而宝贵，所
top_reacted_messages.author: game.producer.light
top_reacted_messages.channel: 对于联动的期限规划 On the Duration and Planning of Collaborations

top_reacted_messages.content: 考虑到我们产能非常宝贵，还是希望留出一些时间来继续《忘却前夜》自己的故事。
